gaps.recommendedResolution: Publish repo MPR evidence in bridge-os before allowing any score movement; until then, use this explicit no-MPR relation witness to explain why bridge-os is evaluated through ecosystem-level MPR context instead of repo-local MPR.

Publish repo MPR evidence in terminal-os before allowing any score movement; until then, use this explicit no-MPR relation witness to explain why terminal-os is evaluated through ecosystem-level MPR context instead of repo-local MPR.

approval.reason: Changing MPR relation treatment can affect SIGNAL process scoring and Observatory rollups.
